Hero.title: Crafting High-Performance Full Stack Web Applications
Hero.subtitle: A software engineer specializing in building premium user experiences, robust backend systems, and scalable cloud solutions using modern technologies.

About.title: About Me
About.subtitle: My Story & Mission
About.bio: I am a passionate Full Stack Developer with a deep love for crafting efficient, scalable, and premium digital solutions. Over the years, I have honed my skills in modern frontend frameworks and robust backend architectures to bridge the gap between complex functionality and beautiful user interfaces.

mission.title: My Mission
mission.text: To build clean, performant, and secure web applications that solve real-world problems and provide outstanding user experiences.

goals.title: My Goals
goals.text: To continuously learn and leverage cutting-edge technologies, contribute to impactful open-source projects, and help brands scale their digital presence.
